Class SkillsService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.skills.service.SkillsService
All Implemented Interfaces:
SkillsAPI
public class SkillsService extends Object implements SkillsAPI
Core service implementing SkillsAPI.

Maintains an in-memory XP cache seeded on player join and cleared on quit. Every XP gain is written through to the database asynchronously. Level is always derived from XP at the point of use, never stored, so config changes to the curve take effect on the next read.

  • Constructor Details

    • SkillsService

      public SkillsService(ISkillRepository repository, SkillRegistry registry, org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin, SkillsConfig config)
      Parameters:
      repository - the persistence layer
      registry - the registry of all registered skills
      plugin - the owning plugin (for event dispatch and scheduler)
      config - the initial config snapshot

  • Method Details

    • reload

      public void reload(SkillsConfig config)
      Swaps the config reference. Safe to call from the main thread during a reload.
      Parameters:
      config - the new config snapshot

    • getConfig

      public SkillsConfig getConfig()
      Returns:
      the current config snapshot

    • load

      public void load(UUID uuid)
      Loads all skill XP from the database into the cache for a joining player. Non-blocking; the DB read runs async and the result lands in the thread-safe cache.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the joining player's UUID

    • unload

      public void unload(UUID uuid)
      Removes a player's data from the cache when they quit. Write-through on every XP gain means no flush is needed here. Also clears cooldown and buff state so memory does not accumulate.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the quitting player's UUID

    • registerSkill

      public void registerSkill(Skill skill, org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin owningPlugin)
      Description copied from interface: SkillsAPI
      Registers a skill contributed by an external plugin and immediately activates its listeners. The owning plugin is used when registering Bukkit event handlers so they are tied to that plugin's lifecycle.

      Call from the owning plugin's onEnable. The skill ID must be unique across all registered skills.

      Specified by:
      registerSkill in interface SkillsAPI
      Parameters:
      skill - the skill to register
      owningPlugin - the plugin that owns this skill

    • unregisterSkill

      public void unregisterSkill(String skillId)
      Description copied from interface: SkillsAPI
      Removes a skill from the registry. Bukkit automatically unregisters the skill's event listeners when the owning plugin unloads, so no explicit listener teardown is needed here.

      Call from the owning plugin's onDisable.

      Specified by:
      unregisterSkill in interface SkillsAPI
      Parameters:
      skillId - the skill identifier to remove

    • getCooldownManager

      public CooldownManager getCooldownManager()
      Specified by:
      getCooldownManager in interface SkillsAPI
      Returns:
      the shared cooldown manager for tracking active skill cooldowns

    • getActiveBuffTracker

      public ActiveBuffTracker getActiveBuffTracker()
      Specified by:
      getActiveBuffTracker in interface SkillsAPI
      Returns:
      the shared buff tracker for tracking timed active skill buffs

    • getCachedXP

      public long getCachedXP(UUID uuid, String skillId)
      Description copied from interface: SkillsAPI
      Returns a player's cached XP for a skill, suitable for synchronous reads such as sidebar rendering. Returns 0 if the player is not cached.
      Specified by:
      getCachedXP in interface SkillsAPI
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      skillId - the skill identifier
      Returns:
      cached XP, or 0 if not loaded

    • getCachedLevel

      public int getCachedLevel(UUID uuid, String skillId)
      Description copied from interface: SkillsAPI
      Returns a player's current level for a skill derived from their cached XP. Returns 0 if the player is not cached.
      Specified by:
      getCachedLevel in interface SkillsAPI
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      skillId - the skill identifier
      Returns:
      current level, or 0 if not loaded

    • awardXP

      public void awardXP(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, String skillId, long amount)
      Description copied from interface: SkillsAPI
      Awards XP to a player in the given skill. Fires SkillXPGainEvent and, if a level boundary is crossed, SkillLevelUpEvent. Must be called from the main thread.
      Specified by:
      awardXP in interface SkillsAPI
      Parameters:
      player - the player receiving XP
      skillId - the skill identifier
      amount - a positive amount of XP to award

    • getXP

      public CompletableFuture<Long> getXP(UUID uuid, String skillId)
      Description copied from interface: SkillsAPI
      Reads a player's XP directly from the database.
      Specified by:
      getXP in interface SkillsAPI
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      skillId - the skill identifier
      Returns:
      a future of the stored XP value

    • adminSetXP

      public CompletableFuture<Long> adminSetXP(UUID uuid, String skillId, long amount)
      Directly sets a player's XP for a skill, clamping to [0, XP cap]. Updates the in-memory cache and writes through to the database. Does not fire events or show level-up effects.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the target player's UUID
      skillId - the skill to modify
      amount - the desired XP value; clamped to [0, cap]
      Returns:
      the actual XP value after clamping

    • adminAddXP

      public CompletableFuture<Long> adminAddXP(UUID uuid, String skillId, long amount)
      Adds XP to a player's skill, clamping at the XP cap. Updates the in-memory cache and writes through to the database. Does not fire events or show level-up effects.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the target player's UUID
      skillId - the skill to modify
      amount - the amount of XP to add; must be positive
      Returns:
      the resulting XP total

    • adminRemoveXP

      public CompletableFuture<Long> adminRemoveXP(UUID uuid, String skillId, long amount)
      Subtracts XP from a player's skill, clamping at zero. Updates the in-memory cache and writes through to the database. Does not fire events or show level-up effects.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the target player's UUID
      skillId - the skill to modify
      amount - the amount of XP to remove; must be positive
      Returns:
      the resulting XP total

    • isAtCap

      public boolean isAtCap(UUID uuid, String skillId)
      Description copied from interface: SkillsAPI
      Returns whether a player is at the level cap for a skill. Uses the cached XP, so returns false if the player is not loaded.
      Specified by:
      isAtCap in interface SkillsAPI
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      skillId - the skill identifier
      Returns:
      true if the player's cached XP equals or exceeds the cap

    • getSkills

      public Collection<Skill> getSkills()
      Specified by:
      getSkills in interface SkillsAPI
      Returns:
      all registered skills in insertion order

    • getSkill

      public Optional<Skill> getSkill(String skillId)
      Description copied from interface: SkillsAPI
      Looks up a registered skill by its identifier.
      Specified by:
      getSkill in interface SkillsAPI
      Parameters:
      skillId - the skill identifier
      Returns:
      the skill, or empty if not registered
